response:
If you want **cheaper alternatives to ProfitWell**, the lowest-cost options in the results are **Pabbly Subscriptions** and **PaySketch**. Pabbly is listed at **$5/month** and PaySketch at **$7.99/month**, both presented as lower-cost replacements for ProfitWell.[1]

A practical shortlist from the results:

| Tool | Listed pricing | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| **Pabbly Subscriptions** | **$5/month** | Positioned as the most affordable option; includes payment analytics, reporting, dunning emails, and multiple gateways.[1] |
| **PaySketch** | **$7.99/month** | Cheaper analytics alternative with transaction-based tiers.[1] |
| **GrowPanel** | **Free until $200k ARR** | Free tier for smaller teams; emphasizes real-time data, AI chat, and forecasting.[2] |
| **Baremetrics** | MRR-based pricing | More feature-rich, but not usually the cheapest; positioned as a premium alternative.[3] |
| **ChartMogul** | Higher-priced premium tool | Mentioned as an alternative, but not a budget option in these results.[1][6] |

If your main goal is **lowest monthly spend**, start with **Pabbly Subscriptions**.[1] If you want a **free tier** and can accept a newer product, **GrowPanel** is another option from the results.[2]

A caveat: the pricing in these results comes from comparison pages and vendor marketing, so exact costs and feature limits may change.[1][2][3]
